summary: Add pp:typed-exit-codes "0,2" and mcp:local-write "true" annotations to the teach-pattern and teach-lookup commands.
reason: The learn-loop generator template (<= 4.28.0) annotated teach/teach-playbook/playbook-amend but omitted the whole Annotations field on their two siblings teach-pattern and teach-lookup, which are the same family (local-store writers that exit 2 via usageErr on missing required flags). Once the live-dogfood matrix honors pp:typed-exit-codes, teach-pattern surfaced as a full-dogfood FAIL. This patch matches the generator fix landed upstream so a regen carries it forward.
validated_outcome: dogfood --live --level full passes 193/193 (teach-pattern/teach-lookup happy_path + json_fidelity now PASS).
